## Meeting Purpose

[Review sales pipeline and discuss key opportunities and actions for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/C_j9uZsH1r6dZg24LB9NoqsCk3ZrQi4C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline for September 2nd and 8th kickoffs is progressing, with several high-potential deals in play](https://fathom.video/share/C_j9uZsH1r6dZg24LB9NoqsCk3ZrQi4C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Multiple deals require follow-up actions from Marcel or Tyler to maintain momentum](https://fathom.video/share/C_j9uZsH1r6dZg24LB9NoqsCk3ZrQi4C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team is becoming more selective with opportunities as pipeline fills, focusing on best-fit clients](https://fathom.video/share/C_j9uZsH1r6dZg24LB9NoqsCk3ZrQi4C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Processes for handling references, multi-language capabilities, and contract negotiations were discussed](https://fathom.video/share/C_j9uZsH1r6dZg24LB9NoqsCk3ZrQi4C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Review for September Kickoffs

### Process Improvements

  - [References: Discussed using more diverse reference contacts (e.g., ICs like Hadassah from Ramp) and introducing via 3-way Slack DM](https://fathom.video/share/C_j9uZsH1r6dZg24LB9NoqsCk3ZrQi4C?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
